cascade.designation: 11 kV indoor switchgear bus-A — 2 MVA oil-filled TX upstream

method_fallback_trail.reason: 2700V model class HCB coefficients available per Sprint A.3 transcription (IEEE 1584-2018 Table 1, applicable 600 V to 15 kV per §7.3)

label.label_required_per: NFPA 70E:2024 §130.5(H) + IEEE 1584-2018 §13.1 — RESTRICTED equipment (IE > 40 cal/cm²) requires distinct RESTRICTED-format label per ANSI Z535.4 §6.2

non_compliance_flags.message: HV-BUS-A IE = 48.2 cal/cm² exceeds the 40 cal/cm² threshold above which no commercially available arc-rated PPE provides adequate protection. Live-work is PROHIBITED per IEEE 1584-2018 §13.1. De-energise before approach OR use remote racking with interlocked door operator. NFPA 70E:2024 Table 130.7(C)(15)(A)(b): PPE categories 1-4 do not extend above 40 cal/cm².

assumptions: fault-level intent consumed; HV-BUS-A Ibf = 25 kA (max) + X/R = 22 from 11 kV utility supply backed by 2 MVA oil-filled TX
db-layout-rollup intent consumed; equipment classified as indoor metal-clad MV switchgear

Electrode configuration HCB engineer-override (auto-inference for 11 kV indoor cubicle could default to VCB; HCB is documented IEEE 1584-2018 §4.1.2 profile for horizontal cylindrical bus assemblies typical at this class)
Working distance 910 mm = standard MV switchgear value per IEEE 1584-2018 Table 8 (36 in)
Gap distance 153 mm = standard MV switchgear value per IEEE 1584-2018 Table 9
Enclosure 914×914×914 mm (≈762 L) within IEEE 1584-2018 §10.5 typical range
t_clear 0.5 s = engineer-declared MV VCB with overcurrent relay (typical 50/51 + reclose-block setting at incomer)
IE 48.2 cal/cm² @ 910 mm + AFB 4275 mm = IEEE 1584-2018 §10 + §11 result using 2700V HCB coefficient set per Sprint A.3 transcription
ppe_category set NULL per INV-07 because IE > 40 cal/cm² → RESTRICTED branch (no PPE category mapping applies above the 40 cal/cm² ceiling)
Compliance set FALSE because the RESTRICTED flag is an error-severity blocker for live-work — operational control (remote racking / de-energise) is the only path forward

rationale.chat_summary: INT 11 kV indoor substation bus-A. IEEE 1584-2018 2700V HCB coefficient set applied per Sprint A.3 transcription. With Ibf = 25 kA, t_clear = 0.5 s, gap 153 mm, working distance 910 mm: I_arc ≈ 22.7 kA → IE ≈ 48.2 cal/cm² → AFB ≈ 4275 mm. IE EXCEEDS 40 cal/cm² → RESTRICTED branch: ppe_category=null, INCIDENT_ENERGY_GT_40_RESTRICTED flag emitted (error severity), live-work PROHIBITED per IEEE 1584-2018 §13.1 + NFPA 70E Table 130.7(C)(15)(A)(b). Operational control required: remote racking with interlocked door operator OR de-energise before approach. PPE alone cannot make this work safe.

sections.title: Input Ingestion + HV Equipment Classification
sections.summary: Consumed fault-level + db-layout-rollup intents. HV-BUS-A: 11 kV indoor metal-clad MV switchgear, 25 kA bolted fault, X/R 22, downstream of 2 MVA oil-immersed TX. Engineer-declared electrode_config = HCB (horizontal cylindrical bars typical for 11 kV indoor cubicles).

decisions.label: HV-BUS-A classified as 2700V model class
decisions.summary: 11 kV nominal falls within IEEE 1584-2018 §7.3 model class boundary 600 V to 15 kV; 2700V coefficient set applies

sections.title: Method Selection — IEEE 1584-2018 Applied (No Fallback)
sections.summary: Sprint A.3 transcribed the IEEE 1584-2018 Table 1 2700V model class coefficients (k1-k7 for HCB, plus arcing-current variation coefficients). Method ieee_1584_2018 applied directly — no Lee 1982 fallback. method_fallback_trail records one entry: ieee_1584_2018 = applied.

decisions.label: ieee_1584_2018 applied
decisions.summary: Coefficients verified per Sprint A.3; voltage 11 kV in 600 V to 15 kV applicability range

sections.title: Arc-Current + Incident-Energy Derivation
sections.summary: I_arc derived from IEEE 1584-2018 §10 with 2700V HCB coefficients: I_arc ≈ 22.7 kA (≈ 91% of Ibf — the HV regime arcing-current reduction is much smaller than at LV). IE evaluated at working distance 910 mm with t_clear 0.5 s, gap 153 mm, enclosure 914 mm cube: IE ≈ 48.2 cal/cm² (incident energy at 36-in face-front working position).

decisions.label: IE 48.2 cal/cm² at 910 mm working distance
decisions.summary: IEEE 1584-2018 §11 formula with 2700V HCB k1-k7 coefficients; CF distance/gap corrections applied per Table 8 + Table 9

decisions.label: Arc-flash boundary 4275 mm
decisions.summary: AFB computed where IE drops to 1.2 cal/cm² (per IEEE 1584-2018 §11 boundary equation): ≈ 4.28 m. AFB > working_distance (910 mm), satisfying invariant boundary_ge_working_distance.

sections.title: RESTRICTED Branch — IE > 40 cal/cm² (Critical Safety Decision)
sections.summary: IE 48.2 cal/cm² exceeds the 40 cal/cm² ceiling. Per IEEE 1584-2018 §13.1, no commercially available arc-rated PPE protects against incident energy above 40 cal/cm² (the limit of practical AR-suit ATPV ratings + the onset of pressure-wave / molten-metal-ejection injury modes not addressed by garment thermal protection). NFPA 70E:2024 Table 130.7(C)(15)(A)(b) PPE categories 1-4 cap out at 40 cal/cm². ppe_category = null is the CORRECT IR encoding (do not pretend Cat 4 covers this); INCIDENT_ENERGY_GT_40_RESTRICTED flag emitted with error severity. Live-work is PROHIBITED. Operational consequence: switch dead before approach OR use remote racking with interlocked door operator. PPE alone cannot make this work safe.

decisions.label: ppe_category set to null
decisions.summary: IE 48.2 > 40 ceiling → null is the contract-correct value per INV-07; do not silently emit Cat 4

decisions.label: Live-work PROHIBITED
decisions.summary: Operational policy: de-energise OR remote-rack with interlocked door operator. No PPE-only approach permitted.

sections.title: Shock-Approach Boundaries (Distinct From Arc-Flash)
sections.summary: Shock-approach distances apply independently of arc-flash even in RESTRICTED branch — they protect against electrical contact, not thermal energy. NFPA 70E:2024 Table 130.4(C)(a) 751 V to 15 kV row: limited movable 3050 mm, limited fixed 1530 mm, restricted 660 mm. These distances remain enforceable when de-energised work plan is followed.

sections.title: Label Recommendation — RESTRICTED Format Required
sections.summary: label_recommended: true. RESTRICTED-class labels follow a distinct format (red full-bezel, RESTRICTED signal-word in lieu of DANGER, explicit 'No commercially available PPE protects against this arc-flash hazard' text per IEEE 1584-2018 §13.1). Downstream arc-flash-labelling skill must select format_applied = 'restricted_format', signal_word = 'RESTRICTED'. ppe_clothing_description must record 'NO PPE ADEQUATE — DE-ENERGISE OR REMOTE-RACK ONLY'.

sections.title: Compliance + Tool-Call Status
sections.summary: compliant: false because INCIDENT_ENERGY_GT_40_RESTRICTED is error-severity — the equipment can only be operated under operational-control (de-energise / remote rack), not by PPE selection. tool_call_pending: false because Sprint A.3 transcribed coefficients are present and IEEE 1584-2018 formulae are deterministic. MV_HV_EQUIPMENT + RESTRICTED_LIVE_WORK_PROHIBITED flags emitted in flags[] for downstream skills to filter.

invariants.evidence: method_applied='ieee_1584_2018' is in the controlled vocabulary {ieee_1584_2018, ieee_1584_2002, lee_1982, nfpa_70e_table, doan_dc, pending}. 2700V model class (IEEE 1584-2018 §7.3) applies because nominal 11 kV is within 600 V to 15 kV range.

method_applied='ieee_1584_2018' equals the method of the last (and only) method_fallback_trail entry where result='applied'. Single-entry trail because coefficients available per Sprint A.3 transcription; no fallback needed.

Numeric outputs populated because method_applied is not in {pending, nfpa_70e_table}: incident_energy_cal_per_cm2=48.2 (finite positive), arc_flash_boundary_mm=4275 (≥ working_distance_mm=910). Both gating conditions satisfied.

ppe_category=null because IE=48.2 > 40 cal/cm² (RESTRICTED branch). INCIDENT_ENERGY_GT_40_RESTRICTED flag present in non_compliance_flags with error severity and node_id='HV-BUS-A'. Per validator.md INV-07 spec: 'If IE > 40: ppe_category is null AND INCIDENT_ENERGY_GT_40_RESTRICTED flag is in non_compliance_flags.' Both conditions hold.

shock_approach block populated with all three distance fields (limited_approach_movable_mm=3050, limited_approach_fixed_mm=1530, restricted_approach_mm=660) and source cites NFPA 70E:2024 Table 130.4(C)(a) 751V to 15 kV row (AC node — correct table).
